LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Buck.label: Slugthrower shell (Buck)
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Buck.description: Large 40mm shotgun shells designed to be fired by the warcasket slugthrower shotgun.
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Slug.label: Slugthrower shell (Slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Slug.description: Large 40mm shotgun shells designed to be fired by the warcasket slugthrower shotgun.
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Beanbag.label: Slugthrower shell (Bean)
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_Beanbag.description: Large 40mm shotgun shells designed to be fired by the warcasket slugthrower shotgun.
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_ElectroSlug.label: Slugthrower shell (EMP)
LanguageData.Ammo_Slugthrower_ElectroSlug.description: Large 40mm shotgun shells designed to be fired by the warcasket slugthrower shotgun.
LanguageData.Bullet_Slugthrower_Buck.label: buckshot pellet
LanguageData.Bullet_Slugthrower_Slug.label: shotgun slug
LanguageData.Bullet_Slugthrower_Beanbag.label: beanbag
LanguageData.Bullet_Slugthrower_ElectroSlug.label: EMP slug
